Our Story

A Legacy of Excellence

Since our founding, Bottle Brothers has been more than just a lounge—it's a destination where luxury meets comfort, and every visit becomes a cherished memory.

Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every detail, from our carefully curated menu to our world-class service. We believe in creating experiences that transcend the ordinary.

Step into a world where sophistication meets warmth, where every cocktail tells a story, and where you're not just a guest—you're family.

50K+

What Our Guests Say

Discover why discerning guests choose Bottle Brothers for their most memorable moments.

"
SJ

"An absolutely divine experience. The attention to detail in every dish is remarkable. Bottle Brothers has redefined luxury dining in the city."

Private Dining · Tirana

Location

Find Us in the Heart of Tirana

Located in one of Tirana's most vibrant neighborhoods, Bottle Brothers offers the perfect escape for those seeking exceptional dining and entertainment. Our venue is easily accessible and surrounded by the city's finest attractions.

Address

Rruga Pjetër Bogdani, Tirana, Albania

Operating Hours

Tue - Sun: 5:00 PM - 2:00 AM

Phone

+355 69 123 4567
